'''âk-l-f''' ('''kakalaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawn|yawn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawn|yawn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kakalaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikalaf|thikalaf]] || [[word:jikalaf|jikalaf]] || [[word:shikalaf|shikalaf]] || [[word:kikalaf|kikalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukalaf|thuthukalaf]] || [[word:jujukalaf|jujukalaf]] || [[word:shushukalaf|shushukalaf]] || [[word:kukukalaf|kukukalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukalaf|thukalaf]] || [[word:jukalaf|jukalaf]] || [[word:shukalaf|shukalaf]] || [[word:kukalaf|kukalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukalaf|thukalaf]] || [[word:jukalaf|jukalaf]] || [[word:shukalaf|shukalaf]] || [[word:kukalaf|kukalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekalaf|thekalaf]] || [[word:jekalaf|jekalaf]] || [[word:shekalaf|shekalaf]] || [[word:kekalaf|kekalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokalaf|thothokalaf]] || [[word:jojokalaf|jojokalaf]] || [[word:shoshokalaf|shoshokalaf]] || [[word:kokokalaf|kokokalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokalaf|thokalaf]] || [[word:jokalaf|jokalaf]] || [[word:shokalaf|shokalaf]] || [[word:kokalaf|kokalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokalaf|thokalaf]] || [[word:jokalaf|jokalaf]] || [[word:shokalaf|shokalaf]] || [[word:kokalaf|kokalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkalaf|thĂŠkalaf]] || [[word:jĂŠkalaf|jĂŠkalaf]] || [[word:shĂŠkalaf|shĂŠkalaf]] || [[word:kĂŠkalaf|kĂŠkalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakalaf|thathakalaf]] || [[word:jajakalaf|jajakalaf]] || [[word:shashakalaf|shashakalaf]] || [[word:kakakalaf|kakakalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakalaf|thakalaf]] || [[word:jakalaf|jakalaf]] || [[word:shakalaf|shakalaf]] || [[word:kakalaf|kakalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakalaf|thakalaf]] || [[word:jakalaf|jakalaf]] || [[word:shakalaf|shakalaf]] || [[word:kakalaf|kakalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakalaf|shakalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakalaf|goshakalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakalaf|gokishakalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakalafnĂŒ|shakalafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakalafnknĂŒ|goshakalafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakalafnĂŒ|gokishakalafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakalafshĂ«|shakalafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakalafnkshĂ«|goshakalafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakalafshĂ«|gokishakalafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakalafro|shakalafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakalafnkro|goshakalafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakalafro|gokishakalafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakalafmu|shakalafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakalafnkmu|goshakalafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakalafmu|gokishakalafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakalafsher|shakalafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakalafnksher|goshakalafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakalafsher|gokishakalafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakalafng|shakalafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakalafnkng|goshakalafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakalafng|gokishakalafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakalafya|shakalafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakalafnkya|goshakalafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakalafya|gokishakalafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakalafyam|shakalafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakalafnkyam|goshakalafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakalafyam|gokishakalafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakalafnĂŒshĂ«|shakalafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakalafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakalafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakalafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakalafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakalafnĂŒro|shakalafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakalafnknĂŒro|goshakalafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakalafnĂŒro|gokishakalafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakalafnĂŒmu|shakalafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakalafnknĂŒmu|goshakalafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakalafnĂŒmu|gokishakalafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakalafshĂ«nĂŒ|shakalafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakalafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakalafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakalafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakalafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakalafshĂ«ro|shakalafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakalafnkshĂ«ro|goshakalafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakalafshĂ«ro|gokishakalafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakalafshĂ«mu|shakalafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakalafnkshĂ«mu|goshakalafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakalafshĂ«mu|gokishakalafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakalafronĂŒ|shakalafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakalafnkronĂŒ|goshakalafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakalafronĂŒ|gokishakalafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakalafroshĂ«|shakalafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakalafnkroshĂ«|goshakalafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakalafroshĂ«|gokishakalafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakalafromu|shakalafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakalafnkromu|goshakalafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakalafromu|gokishakalafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakalafmunĂŒ|shakalafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakalafnkmunĂŒ|goshakalafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakalafmunĂŒ|gokishakalafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakalafmushĂ«|shakalafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakalafnkmushĂ«|goshakalafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakalafmushĂ«|gokishakalafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakalafmuro|shakalafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakalafnkmuro|goshakalafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakalafmuro|gokishakalafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
